memoryArtifacts.description: Proof that Sir Hugh de Peccam (de Péché in French-Norman) was the founder of the Yaldham Branch of the Peckhams. Sir Hugh was a minor son of the de Péché baronial family. Taken from Peckham genealogy volume I.
Tunbridge Castle. Sir Hugh was constable of this castle at around 1199 AD.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de Pêche於大約1145年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可可洛普頓時，他的父親Hamon de Pêche47歲，母親Alice Peverel32歲。他和Alice FitzWalter至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1212年7月9日之前在英國英格蘭素福爾可伍德布里奇，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert de Pêche于大约1145年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可可洛普頓时，他的父亲Hamon de Pêche47岁，母亲Alice Peverel32岁。他和Alice FitzWalter至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1212年7月9日之前在英国英格兰素福爾可伍德布里奇，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pêche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de Pêche was born about 1145, in Clopton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hamon de Pêche, was 47 and his mother, Alice Peverel, was 32. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Alice FitzWalter. He died before 9 July 1212, in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de Pêche est né environ 1145, à Clopton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hamon de Pêche, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Alice Peverel, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Alice FitzWalter. Il est décédé avant 9 juillet 1212, à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert de Pêche um 1145 in Clopton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hamon de Pêche 47 und seine Mutter Alice Peverel 32. Er hatte mit Alice FitzWalter mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 9. Juli 1212 in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Pêche è nato il circa 1145 nel Clopton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hamon de Pêche, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Alice Peverel, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Alice FitzWalter. Morì prima del 9 luglio 1212, nel Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Pêcheが約1145年にイギリスイギリススフォルククロプトンで生まれた時，父Hamon de Pêcheは47歳，母Alice Peverelは32歳であった。彼はAlice FitzWalterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1212年7月9日以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクウッドブリッジで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de Pêche(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 클로프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hamon de Pêche(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Peverel(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Alice FitzWalter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 7월 9일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 우드브리지에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de Pêche nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Clopton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hamon de Pêche, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Alice Peverel, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Alice FitzWalter. Ele faleceu antes 9 de julho de 1212, em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de Pêche родился около 1145 г. в местности клоптон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hamon de Pêche было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Peverel, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Alice FitzWalter. Он умер перед 9 июля 1212 г. в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
